objective: Rebuild the Backup Browser modal using native @decky/ui components and fix open-at-bottom behavior
design_decisions: Replaced custom hardcoded div layout and hex colors with @decky/ui Dialog primitives (DialogHeader, DialogBody, DialogButton, Field).
Collapsed double focus stops into a single focus stop by using a presentational Field wrapping a focusable DialogButton for each backup item.
Added a firstRowRef on the newest snapshot's Restore button and used double requestAnimationFrame after data loads to explicitly focus it, fixing the open-at-bottom issue.

Used a ReactNode for the description prop in Field to ensure multi-line comments render properly via
.
Removed the footer Close button, relying entirely on the native built-in top-right close icon.
results: Modal refactored to native Decky UI, resolving visual inconsistencies.
Passed code review successfully, though specific scrolling edge cases require on-device validation in the dev build.
